name: State Bank Of Cherry
description_short: State Bank of Cherry is a traditional community bank offering checking, savings, agricultural loans, mortgages, and auto loans with online and mobile banking access.
description_long: State Bank of Cherry is a community-focused bank operating with NMLS #509252 and routing number #071112176. The bank serves customers seeking traditional banking services with a local presence and personalized service model. The institution positions itself as an agricultural-friendly lender, emphasizing its support for farming and rural communities through specialized loan products. State Bank of Cherry maintains a physical branch location with recent changes to operating hours as of October 1, 2025, including appointment-only Saturday lobby access and limited drive-up hours. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of retail banking products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), auto loans for new and used vehicles, mortgage services including adjustable-rate mortgages, and specialized agricultural lending. Their agricultural division covers real estate loans, equipment financing, and operating lines of credit—indicating a deliberate market focus on farm and ranch operations. The bank provides online banking enrollment and a mobile app enabling customers to check balances, transfer funds, and deposit checks remotely. Additional customer tools include loan payment calculators, loan payoff calculators, mortgage calculators, adjustable-rate mortgage calculators, and CD calculators. State Bank of Cherry positions itself as a convenient alternative to larger national banks while maintaining community ties. The bank's recent operational changes, including reduced Saturday hours and appointment-based lobby access, may reflect staffing adjustments or cost optimization typical of smaller regional institutions. Their emphasis on agricultural lending suggests they may not be the best fit for urban customers or those seeking specialized fintech solutions, as the bank appears focused on traditional banking relationships. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Equipment financing for farms and ranches
Mobile banking app with check deposit and transfer capabilities
pros: Specialized agricultural lending including real estate, equipment financing, and operating lines of credit—uncommon among smaller banks
Online banking enrollment and dedicated mobile app for remote account management and mobile check deposits
Multiple loan calculators available on website (payment, payoff, mortgage, ARM, CD) for customer self-service
Local community bank with personalized loan specialist assistance for mortgage services
Traditional banking products including checking, savings, and CD accounts with no fintech gimmicks
Accessible phone support (815-894-2345) and fax contact for customer service
cons: Significantly reduced in-person banking hours as of October 1, 2025—Saturday lobbies closed except by appointment, weekday hours not specified
Limited drive-up window hours (7:30 AM to 12:00 PM only) restricts afternoon and evening access
No information provided about interest rates, fees, minimum balances, or specific loan terms on website
Website does not disclose insurance products, investment services, or business banking options despite mentioning business loans in some contexts
No online loan application process described—customers must contact bank or use appointment system
best_for: Agricultural business owners and farmers seeking specialized ag loans with local relationship banking
Rural and small-town customers prioritizing community bank support over large national chains
Customers seeking traditional mortgage and auto loans with personalized specialist assistance
Customers comfortable with limited in-person hours and appointment-based banking access
diagnosis: State Bank of Cherry is best for agricultural business owners, farmers, and rural customers seeking traditional community bank services with specialized farm lending expertise. Primary caveat: Significantly reduced in-person hours (appointment-only Saturday lobbies, limited drive-up access) and lack of online loan application processes mean customers require flexible scheduling and comfort with phone/mail-based banking interactions. Not ideal for those prioritizing extended branch access or online loan origination.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
